description_long: This chaise features a modern, angular design with a prominent slanted seat and a raised backrest. The main structure appears to be constructed from a solid, light-colored material, possibly painted wood or composite, with a sleek, smooth finish. The seat is inclined and supported by a robust base, while the backrest is slightly elevated and integrated into the main frame, providing ergonomic support. A transparent or lightly tinted glass or acrylic panel is attached along the side, adding a contemporary touch and visual interest. The chaise is supported by a solid, block-like base that ensures stability and prevents tipping. Minimalist metal railings or handles are present at the top, likely for added safety or aesthetic enhancement.
description: A modern, angular chaise with a slanted seat, integrated backrest, and a side glass or acrylic panel, supported by a solid base and accented with minimalist metal railings.
description_view_0: From this view, the slanted seat and the transparent side panel are clearly visible, along with the raised backrest and metal railings.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the stepped or tiered seat structure and the solid base, with the metal railings visible at the top.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the full width of the chaise and the angular design of the seat and backrest, with the glass panel's edge visible.
description_view_3: From this end view, the thickness of the base and the overall compactness of the chaise are most apparent.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the main frame, slightly elevated, and follows the angular, minimalist style of the chaise. It is solid, without visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no traditional armrests, but a minimalist metal railing is present on one side, serving as a partial arm support or safety feature.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise does not have distinct legs; instead, it is supported by a solid, block-like base that extends the full length and width of the structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: No visible upholstery is present; the surfaces are smooth and solid, likely painted or finished wood or composite, with a sleek, untextured appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible cushions; the seating and backrest surfaces are integrated into the main structure, providing a continuous, minimalist seating area.
